title: Xylem (XYL) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth

title: Xylem (XYL) to Post Q3 Earnings: Will Cost Woes Mar Results?
text: High raw material costs and supply chain disruptions are likely to have weighed on Xylem's (XYL) Q3 performance. However, strong underlying demand is expected to have aided the company's top line.

title: Xylem (XYL) Upgraded to Buy: What Does It Mean for the Stock?
text: Xylem (XYL) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

title: Water Utilities Set the Pace in Race to Reduce Carbon Emissions

title: 7 Best Water Stocks to Buy Now
text: Water is not usually thought of as an exciting or innovative industry. It's a basic good typically sold at a fairly low cost.

title: Xylem Leading the Way Toward a More Resilient and Water Secure Future at WEFTEC
